message:
fix(web): normalize keyboard hint and placeholder text

Minor UI text consistency improvements:

Sidebar.tsx:
- Change ⌘K to "Cmd K" for cross-platform clarity
- The Unicode command symbol (⌘) renders inconsistently across
  fonts and platforms; explicit "Cmd K" is universally readable

CommandPalette.tsx:
- Change "Jump to…" to "Jump to..." (Unicode ellipsis to ASCII)
- Ensures consistent rendering regardless of font support
- Matches project convention of avoiding special Unicode characters
  in user-facing text where ASCII equivalents exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ export function Sidebar() {
Command palette - ⌘K + Cmd K
